policy: Do not perform broad directory moves while governance contracts, examples, and generated-output gates depend on current paths. Strengthen directory boundaries with machine checks first, then migrate one example family at a time after P10 convergence if evidence supports it.

deployAssetBoundary.policy: Repository-level Kubernetes and Helm assets live only under deploy/. Top-level k8s/ and charts/ directories are retired and must not be reintroduced.

examplesGroupingPlan.migrationPolicy: Keep current examples/* paths stable until a future task migrates one family at a time and updates all gates in the same commit.

commandFileFamilies.domain: AI planning, manifest, governance, and project apply commands
API format, import, route, diff, codegen, docs, middleware, and client commands
RPC IDL, protoc, descriptor, scaffold, template, and auxiliary commands
Model DDL, datasource, Mongo, MySQL, Postgres, and output commands
New service, API, RPC, goctl compatibility, discovery overlay, and scaffold commands
Plugin registry, install, run, plan, and mode commands
Release check, local checks, contract checks, output, and helper commands
Doctor diagnostics, checks, tests, and support remediation output
Help catalog, topics, metadata, usage, and rendering
Configuration command and config field helpers

testNamingBaseline.forbiddenSuffixPolicy: No project-specific unit-test, benchmark, fuzz suffixes, or underscore-delimited test function names are allowed in generated or touched tests.
testNamingBaseline.policy: Project-specific test and benchmark suffixes and underscore-delimited test function names are not allowed. Any reintroduction must fail project-layout-governance-check.
